leadText: The Pearl String (Japanese: おだんごしんじゅ Pearl Dango) is a valuable item introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Pearl String serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 Very large pearls that sparkle in a pretty silver color. A maniac will buy them for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA Very large pearls that sparkle in a pretty silver color. They can be sold at a high price to shops. S V ZA Very large pearls that have a nice silvery sheen to them. They can be sold at a high price to shops.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price B W B2 W2 N/A N/A * X Y OR AS N/A $ 7,500 S M US UM N/A $ 15,000 Sw Sh S V ZA N/A $ 10,000 In the Generation V games, the Pearl String can be sold to the ore maniac inside the Icirrus City Pokémon Center for $ 25000. In Pokémon Sword and Shield , the Pearl String can be sold to the valuable item buyer in Stow-on-Side for $ 27,500. Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Pearl String serves no practical purpose other than to be sold. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 Very large pearls that sparkle in a pretty silver color. A maniac will buy them for a high price. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA Very large pearls that sparkle in a pretty silver color. They can be sold at a high price to shops. S V ZA Very large pearls that have a nice silvery sheen to them. They can be sold at a high price to shops.
